## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for Firework's new Webflow-based blog launch, addressing technical implementation and content migration challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Launch delayed; blog, magic button, and homepage development ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Pagination prioritized over category filtering for initial launch](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [CMS structure reviewed; additional fields (meta title, description) to be added](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Image import and alt text issues to be addressed with potential AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

## Topics

### Blog Development Status

  - [Navigation and footer still in progress](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Basic layout implemented with authors, dates, and content](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Infinite scroll currently in place, but pagination to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Single blog post page design reviewed; CTA temporarily removed](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### SEO and Crawlability Concerns

  - [Pagination (20 articles/page) prioritized over category filtering for launch](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Table of contents using H2 headings to be added for improved crawling](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Meta title and description fields to be added to CMS for better SEO](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Content Migration and Cleanup

  - [\~440 articles migrated; some image/article mismatches being corrected](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [URL structure being maintained; cleaning up instances of "HTTP blog" in slugs](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Alt text being added to images for SEO purposes](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

### Author Profiles

  - [Author profile pages to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Content for author profiles to be provided by Carolyn](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Future enhancement: 3-line author description with social links at bottom of posts](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Performance Optimization

  - [Considering lazy loading for images if performance issues arise](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Exploring options like preload/prefetch for improved loading times](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Mobile-specific optimizations to be investigated](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### CMS Structure and Fields

  - [Current fields: name (title), slug, author, date published, categories, read time, featured image, alt text, content](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [To be added: separate H1 field, meta title, meta description](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Rich text field confirmed for content, allowing H2-H4 formatting](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement pagination for blog index page (20 articles/page)](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Add table of contents using H2 headings to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Create author profile pages and link from blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Add meta title and description fields to CMS](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Address image import issues and improve alt text (consider AI assistance)](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Continue development of navigation and footer](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Carolyn to work on filtering implementation](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Team to review provided inspiration document for widget ideas](https://fathom.video/share/kuuxPKiHzH2QmCs7xoJ5vFc-nSfLKBa4?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
